response.justification: Bogdan has extensive full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud tools like AWS CDK, with direct exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and testing frameworks — aligning well with the role's core stack and responsibilities, though his lack of explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience and limited evidence of enterprise automation tooling context are moderate gaps.
strengths: Proven full-stack expertise with TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling
Strong DevOps and testing culture (CI/CD, TDD, Vitest-equivalent tools)
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume
Limited evidence of enterprise internal tooling domain experience
German language proficiency is basic, may hinder local collaboration
